Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blue Titan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The Blue Titan was meant to compete against the magic of the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The narrator has run missions in the Blue Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The narrator dismissed the Blue Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Blue Titan is keyed to water elementalism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Blue Titan is equipped with a resonance cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Blue Titan's resonance cannon uses projectors in its eyes to shine light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Blue Titan uses magic circles that resonate with the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Blue Titan's staff is designed to work with elemental magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Blue Titan is a mech that possesses magic resistance.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Blue Titan is described as a pile of scrap.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
